arts.ttl: Thomas Müller rates his latest Bayern Munich performances
arts.sum: “Personally, I’m in a good mood and, although I haven’t picked up too many minutes so far, I’ve still been involved in every game. “Generally good,” Müller said in a recent interview with Bundesliga.com, reflecting on his performances in 2024/25 so far (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong still ranks Celtic the BEST in one category as he gives Hoops '50/50' chance of Dortmund upset
arts.sum: Frimpong can see his old team springing a surprise on the German giants

arts.ttl: Lukáš Hrádecký: "We'll need to up our game against Bayern Munich"
arts.sum: As reigning Bundesliga champions, Bayer Leverkusen enter this weekend's clash against Bayern Munich in a strong position. Ahead of the encounter, Werkself captain Lukáš Hrádecký spoke to bundesliga.com about the visit to the Allianz Arena and how it feels to be the Meisterschale holders...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exec looking forward to seeing Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz on field together
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala gives me great joy as sporting director of Bayern Munich. The Bundesliga’s marquee matchup will feature two of the league — and the world’s — most exciting young players in Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala and Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Granit Xhaka ready to lead Leverkusen against Bayern Munich in Bundesliga clash of titans
arts.sum: All eyes will be on Bavaria this Saturday as Bayern Munich takes on Bayer Leverkusen in an early-season chance to reassert its claim on the German throne. After Bayern’s strong start under new head coach Vincent Kompany — and Leverkusen’s early-season stumble in a 2-3 loss to RB Leipzig — the defending champions know they cannot simply approach this one as favorites.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen preview: A mammoth top-of-the-table clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their 100% start to the season when they welcome reigning Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen to the Allianz Arena for Saturday’s highly-anticipated fixture.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso knows the challenge Bayern Munich will present
arts.sum: Going to the Allianz Arena is probably the toughest game of the Bundesliga season. After dethroning his former club last season in the Bundesliga, Alonso knows Saturday’s tilt is one of the most anticipated battles for his team during the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Preview | Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Goals expected in top of the table clash
arts.sum: High flying Bayern Munich host Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday in a fixture that could potentially be very important in the Bundesliga title race. Bayern have enjoyed the perfect start to…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Lineups, team news, is Vincent Kompany really a match for Xabi Alonso, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: We already covered WHY his new-look Bayern is different from the one coached by Tuchel on our recent podcast (which you can listen to below or on Spotify ), but all that won’t mean much if it ends in another loss regardless. Now, Vincent Kompany has a chance to make things right, and show the world that Bayern Munich mean business this season.
